lessons.name: Unit 8: Tourism
lessons.description: Learn about tourism with relative pronouns.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Tourism: tourist, traveler, visitor, sightseeing, tour, excursion, package tour, guided tour, itinerary, destination

Accommodation: hotel, resort, hostel, guesthouse, homestay, motel, inn, lodge, check-in, check-out, reservation, booking

Transportation: flight, train, bus, taxi, cruise, ferry, rental car, transfer

Activities: sightseeing, shopping, dining, swimming, hiking, diving, surfing, skiing, photography

Places: attraction, landmark, monument, museum, gallery, temple, pagoda, beach, mountain, park

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about tourism, travel, accommodation, and tourist activities.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Relative Pronouns (Đại từ quan hệ)

A. Các đại từ quan hệ:

  • who: thay thế cho người (làm chủ ngữ hoặc tân ngữ)
  • Ex: The man who is standing there is a tourist.
  • whom: thay thế cho người (làm tân ngữ - formal)
  • Ex: The woman whom I met was a guide.
  • which: thay thế cho vật, động vật
  • Ex: The hotel which we stayed at was nice.
  • that: thay thế cho người hoặc vật (có thể thay who, whom, which)
  • Ex: The tourist that visited us was friendly.
  • Ex: The place that I visited was beautiful.
  • whose: thay thế cho sở hữu (của người hoặc vật)
  • Ex: The tourist whose bag was lost is upset.
  • where: thay thế cho nơi chốn
  • Ex: The city where I was born is beautiful.
  • when: thay thế cho thời gian
  • Ex: The day when we arrived was sunny.

B. Cách dùng:

  • 1. Làm chủ ngữ:
  • Ex: The tourist who/that visited us was friendly.
  • (who/that = chủ ngữ, không thể bỏ)
  • 2. Làm tân ngữ:
  • Ex: The woman (whom/that) I met was a guide.
  • (whom/that = tân ngữ, có thể bỏ)
  • 3. Sau giới từ:
  • Ex: The hotel which/that we stayed at was nice.
  • Ex: The hotel at which we stayed was nice. (formal)

C. Khi nào dùng THAT:

  • Sau so sánh nhất: the best, the most beautiful
  • Ex: It's the best hotel that I've ever stayed at.
  • Sau: all, everything, nothing, something, anything
  • Ex: Everything that he said was true.
  • Sau: the only, the first, the last
  • Ex: She's the only person that can help.
  • Khi có cả người và vật
  • Ex: The man and the dog that I saw were running.

D. Khi nào KHÔNG dùng THAT:

  • Sau dấu phẩy (mệnh đề không xác định)
  • Ex: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful. (không dùng 'that')
  • Sau giới từ (formal)
  • Ex: The hotel at which we stayed... (không dùng 'at that')

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Who/That cho người
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • who/that thay thế cho người
  • Làm chủ ngữ: không thể bỏ
  • Làm tân ngữ: có thể bỏ

examples.question: The tourist ______ visited us was friendly.
examples.solution: The tourist who/that visited us was friendly.
examples.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

examples.question: The woman ______ I met was a guide.
examples.solution: The woman (whom/that) I met was a guide.
examples.explanation: whom/that thay thế cho người (tân ngữ, có thể bỏ)

examples.question: The man ______ is standing there is a tourist.
examples.solution: The man who/that is standing there is a tourist.
examples.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Which/That cho vật
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • which/that thay thế cho vật
  • Làm chủ ngữ: không thể bỏ
  • Làm tân ngữ: có thể bỏ

examples.question: The hotel ______ we stayed at was nice.
examples.solution: The hotel (which/that) we stayed at was nice.
examples.explanation: which/that thay thế cho vật (tân ngữ, có thể bỏ)

examples.question: The place ______ I visited was beautiful.
examples.solution: The place (which/that) I visited was beautiful.
examples.explanation: which/that thay thế cho vật (tân ngữ, có thể bỏ)

examples.question: The bus ______ goes to the airport is late.
examples.solution: The bus which/that goes to the airport is late.
examples.explanation: which/that thay thế cho vật (chủ ngữ, không thể bỏ)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Whose/Where/When
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • whose: sở hữu
  • where: nơi chốn
  • when: thời gian

examples.question: The tourist ______ bag was lost is upset.
examples.solution: The tourist whose bag was lost is upset.

examples.question: The city ______ I was born is beautiful.
examples.solution: The city where I was born is beautiful.

examples.question: The day ______ we arrived was sunny.
examples.solution: The day when we arrived was sunny.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Khi nào dùng That
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Sau so sánh nhất
  • Sau all, everything, nothing
  • Sau the only, the first, the last
  • Có cả người và vật

examples.question: It's the best hotel ______ I've ever stayed at.
examples.solution: It's the best hotel that I've ever stayed at.
examples.explanation: Sau so sánh nhất → dùng that

examples.question: She's the only person ______ can help.
examples.solution: She's the only person that can help.

exercises.question: The tourist ______ visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: who thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: The hotel ______ we stayed at was nice.
exercises.explanation: which thay thế cho vật

exercises.question: The woman ______ I met was a guide.
exercises.explanation: whom thay thế cho người (tân ngữ)

exercises.question: The tourist ______ bag was lost is upset.
exercises.explanation: whose = sở hữu

exercises.question: The city ______ I was born is beautiful.
exercises.explanation: where = nơi chốn

exercises.question: The day ______ we arrived was sunny.
exercises.explanation: when = thời gian

exercises.question: It's the best hotel ______ I've ever stayed at.
exercises.explanation: Sau so sánh nhất → dùng that

exercises.question: Everything ______ he said was true.
exercises.explanation: Sau everything → dùng that

exercises.question: The place ______ I visited was beautiful.
exercises.explanation: which thay thế cho vật

exercises.question: She's the only person ______ can help.
exercises.explanation: Sau the only → dùng that

exercises.question: Which relative pronouns can replace people? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: who, whom, that (cho người). Sai: which (cho vật)

exercises.question: Which relative pronouns can replace things? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: which, that (cho vật). who (cho người); whose (sở hữu)

exercises.question: When must we use 'that'? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: sau so sánh nhất, everything, the only. Sai: sau dấu phẩy (dùng which, không dùng that)

exercises.question: Fill in: The tourist ______ visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: Fill in: The hotel ______ we stayed at was nice.
exercises.explanation: which/that thay thế cho vật (tân ngữ)

exercises.question: Fill in: The city ______ I was born is beautiful.
exercises.explanation: where = nơi chốn

exercises.question: Fill in: It's the best hotel ______ I've ever stayed at.
exercises.explanation: Sau so sánh nhất → dùng that

exercises.question: Rearrange: tourist / The / who / visited / us / was / friendly / . / hotel / The / which / stayed / we / at / was / nice / .
exercises.sample_answer: The tourist who visited us was friendly. The hotel which we stayed at was nice.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: who (người), which (vật)

exercises.question: Combine: The tourist was friendly. The tourist visited us. → The tourist ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The tourist who/that visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: dùng who/that thay thế cho 'the tourist' (người)

exercises.question: Combine: The hotel was nice. We stayed at the hotel. → The hotel ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The hotel which/that we stayed at was nice. / The hotel at which we stayed was nice.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: dùng which/that thay thế cho 'the hotel' (vật)

exercises.question: Rearrange: city / The / where / was / I / born / is / beautiful / . / day / The / when / arrived / we / was / sunny / .
exercises.sample_answer: The city where I was born is beautiful. The day when we arrived was sunny.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: where (nơi chốn), when (thời gian)

exercises.question: Combine three sentences: The tourist was friendly. The tourist visited us. The tourist's bag was lost. → The tourist ______ and ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The tourist who/that visited us was friendly and whose bag was lost. / The tourist whose bag was lost and who visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: dùng who/that (người) và whose (sở hữu)
